languages.text: {n}Янур прижимает пальцем портативный вокс к изуродованному уху и мрачнеет.{/n} "Вот уж... Они пошли в новую атаку по всем фронтам. Мне нужно возвращаться на другой ярус корней. Задержу стольких, скольких смогу".

{n}Janur presses a portable vox to his mangled ear, his expression darkening.{/n} "Damn it... They've launched a fresh attack on all fronts. I have to get back to the other level of the roots. I'll hold back as many as I can."
languages.original_text: {n}Янур прижимает пальцем портативный вокс к изуродованному уху и мрачнеет.{/n} "Вот уж... Они пошли в новую атаку по всем фронтам. Мне нужно возвращаться на другой ярус корней. Задержу стольких, скольких смогу".

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur presses a portable vox to his mangled ear, his expression darkens.{/n} "Damn it... They've launched a new attack on all fronts. I have to get back to the other level of the roots. I'll hold back as many as I can."

{n}Janur presses a portable vox to his mangled ear, his expression darkening.{/n} "Damn it... They've launched a fresh attack on all fronts. I have to get back to the other level of the roots. I'll hold back as many as I can."
"I have to go back. Freedom for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I'll hold back as many as I can."

{n}Janur presses a portable vox to his mangled ear, his expression darkens.{/n} "Damn it... They've launched a new attack on all fronts. I have to get back to the other level of the roots. I'll hold back as many as I can."

{n}Janur presses a portable vox to his mangled ear, his expression darkening.{/n} "Damn it... They've launched a fresh attack on all fronts. I have to get back to the other level of the roots. I'll hold back as many as I can."

languages.text: 「戻らなきゃ。一人に自由を！おぬし様！できるだけ引き止めるわ」
languages.original_text: "I have to go back. Freedom for the one, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I'll hold back as many as I can."

traits.locale_text: 「戻らなきゃ。一人に自由を！おぬし様！できるだけ引き止めるわ」

languages.text: {n}Janur se lleva un voco portátil a la oreja con gesto sombrío.{/n} «Maldita sea... Están lanzando un nuevo ataque en todos los frentes. Debo volver al otro nivel de las raíces. Contendré a todos los que pueda».
languages.original_text: {n}Janur presses a portable vox to his mangled ear, his expression darkening.{/n} "Damn it... They've launched a fresh attack on all fronts. I have to get back to the other level of the roots. I'll hold back as many as I can."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur se lleva un voco portátil a la oreja con gesto sombrío.{/n} «Maldita sea... Están lanzando un nuevo ataque en todos los frentes. Debo volver al otro nivel de las raíces. Contendré a todos los que pueda».

languages.text: {n}Janur presst ein tragbares Vox an sein verstümmeltes Ohr und seine Miene verfinstert sich.{/n} "Verdammt ... Sie haben an allen Fronten einen neuen Angriff gestartet. Ich muss zurück auf die andere Ebene der Wurzeln. Ich werde möglichst viele von ihnen aufhalten."
languages.original_text: {n}Janur presses a portable vox to his mangled ear, his expression darkening.{/n} "Damn it... They've launched a fresh attack on all fronts. I have to get back to the other level of the roots. I'll hold back as many as I can."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur presst ein tragbares Vox an sein verstümmeltes Ohr und seine Miene verfinstert sich.{/n} "Verdammt ... Sie haben an allen Fronten einen neuen Angriff gestartet. Ich muss zurück auf die andere Ebene der Wurzeln. Ich werde möglichst viele von ihnen aufhalten."

languages.text: {n}Janur presse un vox portatif contre son oreille mutilée et son visage s'assombrit.{/n} « Bon sang... Ils ont lancé une nouvelle attaque sur tous les fronts. Je dois retourner à l'autre niveau des racines. Je vais tenter d'en arrêter autant que possible. »
languages.original_text: {n}Janur presses a portable vox to his mangled ear, his expression darkening.{/n} "Damn it... They've launched a fresh attack on all fronts. I have to get back to the other level of the roots. I'll hold back as many as I can."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur presse un vox portatif contre son oreille mutilée et son visage s'assombrit.{/n} « Bon sang... Ils ont lancé une nouvelle attaque sur tous les fronts. Je dois retourner à l'autre niveau des racines. Je vais tenter d'en arrêter autant que possible. »

languages.text: {n}雅努尔将便携音阵按在他那只残缺的耳朵上，脸色越来越难看。{/n}“该死……它们在所有战线上都发起了新攻势。我必须赶回根系区的另一层，能挡住多少算多少。”
languages.original_text: {n}Janur presses a portable vox to his mangled ear, his expression darkening.{/n} "Damn it... They've launched a fresh attack on all fronts. I have to get back to the other level of the roots. I'll hold back as many as I can."

traits.locale_text: {n}雅努尔将便携音阵按在他那只残缺的耳朵上，脸色越来越难看。{/n}“该死……它们在所有战线上都发起了新攻势。我必须赶回根系区的另一层，能挡住多少算多少。”

languages.text: {n}Janur, taşınabilir bir voksu parçalanmış kulağına bastırırken yüzü asılıyor.{/n} "Kahretsin... Tüm cephelerden yeni bir saldırı başlattılar. Diğer kök seviyesine dönmeliyim. Tutabildiğim kadarını tutacağım."
